title: Goose Udon Noodle Bowl (Hanakara)
description: A Japanese-inspired dish originating from the Eastern region, utilizing goose meat and a variety of medicinal herbs to create a soothing, hangover-reducing meal.

ingredients.name: Medicinal herbs (dried)
ingredients.notes: Optional, to aid in hangover relief

instructions: Boil the Udon noodles in salted water until al dente.
Prepare the miso paste by dissolving it in 2 cups of hot water.
Sear the ginger slices in sesame oil until caramelized.
Combine cooked goose meat, Udon noodles, miso broth, sesame oil, ginger, and scallions in a bowl.
Sprinkle chopped green onions and medicinal herbs (if using) over the top.
Garnish with additional scallions and sesame seeds (if desired).
